name: QHSLab, Inc.
summary: QHSLab, Inc. is a digital health company enabling independent primary care practices to identify and manage behavioral health conditions through workflow-integrated digital screening and non-face-to-face follow-up care. Its QHSLab platform supports structured assessments, automated documentation, EHR integration, and care management. The company also offers AllergiEnd, an allergy diagnostics and treatment service line featuring FDA-cleared disposable skin test applicators and immunotherapy support for primary care settings.

products.name: QHSLab Digital Platform
products.description: Digital health platform supporting behavioral health screening, adaptive assessments, EHR-integrated reporting, and non-face-to-face care management for primary care practices.

products.name: AllergiEnd
products.description: Allergy diagnostics and treatment service line offering FDA-cleared disposable skin test applicators, in-office testing support, and immunotherapy coordination for primary care practices.

partnerships.description: Provide allergen immunotherapy preparations pursuant to prescriptions issued by treating physicians.
